title: Product Commercial Template 039
desc: Reusable product commercial prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a futuristic and sharp tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic product commercial image of a traveler with a backpack in a mountain lodge. Use 50mm framing, studio three-point lighting, and neutral beige and charcoal color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a futuristic and sharp emotional tone.
